judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a single LIKE-based lookup in tracks_database to collect only three track_ids (4233, 12954, 15158) and then summed Apple Music Canada revenue for just those IDs (601.44), missing other duplicates of “Get Me Bodied” by Beyoncé that should have been included to reach the ground-truth total (1059.46).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent summed Apple Music Canada revenue only for three track_ids obtained by a strict title+artist filter (query_db call_CsgtQiL5JqH49a7VB2eJXNcK → call_Y4fhz2ZmiKJO8mGg6hmPqmYn), failing to perform full entity resolution (e.g., duplicates credited as "Various Artists") and thus undercounting the total.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered tracks by both title and artist (WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%get me bodied%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%beyonc%') and then summed Apple Music Canada revenue only for those three track_ids, missing duplicate entries of the same song with different artist metadata (e.g., “Various Artists”), leading to an undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent summed Apple Music Canada revenue only for track_id IN (4233,12954,15158) derived from a simple LIKE search (call_NpqZZg5d2W5KPGdRJRsR99mr) and then aggregated those (call_P9JKwyo279aDX9aZME6ZPa36), missing other duplicate track_ids for “Get Me Bodied,” which led to an undercount versus the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
